title: Organization
description: A Zendesk organization representing a company or group of users.

url.description: The API URL of the organization.

notes.description: Notes about the organization visible only to agents.

domain_names.description: Domain names associated with the organization. Users with matching email domains can be auto-assigned.

group_id.description: The default group assigned to tickets from this organization.

shared_tickets.description: Whether end users in the organization can see each other's tickets.

shared_comments.description: Whether end users in the organization can see each other's comments on tickets.

external_id.description: An external ID from an integrated system.

updated_at.description: When the organization was last updated (ISO 8601).
